evidence: Vulnerable groups considered: people with respiratory risk, children

retrieved_guidelines.query: wildfire Wildfire smoke is spreading toward two communities. One access road is blocked. Residents report ash fall and breathing difficulty. Evacuation route update needed. vulnerable groups communication privacy

results.title: Wildfire evacuation and smoke exposure
results.guideline: Create evacuation zones, reduce smoke exposure, support people with respiratory risk, maintain clear escape routes, and avoid sending responders into unsafe fire corridors without official clearance.

results.title: Cyclone preparedness and sheltering
results.guideline: Activate shelters before landfall, secure loose outdoor objects, prioritize coastal and river-adjacent communities, prepare backup communication, and keep vulnerable groups near support services.

results.title: Privacy-preserving crisis support
results.guideline: Remove personal identifiers unless needed for consent-based rescue coordination, keep logs minimal, and never expose private phone numbers or addresses in public alerts.

results.title: Landslide early warning and road safety
results.guideline: Avoid unstable slopes, monitor blocked roads and cracked ground, relocate households near steep terrain, and coordinate safe routes for rescue and supplies.

recommended_actions: Escalate to local emergency coordination immediately.
Publish evacuation-route update and blocked-road warning.
Move smoke-sensitive residents toward cleaner-air shelter areas.
Distribute masks where available and reduce outdoor exposure.
Request additional drinking water: estimated 72-hour gap is 11,700 litres.
resource_plan.disclaimer: Decision-support only. Follow official emergency services and local authority instructions.

public_messages.english: Safety update for Northern California, USA: wildfire risk is currently critical. Please follow official instructions. Priority actions: 1) Escalate to local emergency coordination immediately. 2) Publish evacuation-route update and blocked-road warning. 3) Move smoke-sensitive residents toward cleaner-air shelter areas. Do not share private phone numbers or exact home addresses in public comments.
public_messages.bangla: Northern California, USA এলাকার জন্য নিরাপত্তা আপডেট: বর্তমানে wildfire ঝুঁকির মাত্রা critical. আপনি স্থানীয় কর্তৃপক্ষের নির্দেশনা অনুসরণ করুন। অগ্রাধিকার কাজ: 1) Escalate to local emergency coordination immediately. 2) Publish evacuation-route update and blocked-road warning. 3) Move smoke-sensitive residents toward cleaner-air shelter areas. জনসমক্ষে ব্যক্তিগত ফোন নম্বর বা সুনির্দিষ্ট ঠিকানা শেয়ার করবেন না।
